allow: Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\); from server.environment import Environment; e = Environment\(\); print\('✓ Environment imports successfully'\)")
PowerShell(Write-Output "OPENAI_API_BASE env: $env:OPENAI_API_BASE"; Write-Output "OPENAI_HOST env: $env:OPENAI_HOST"; Write-Output "OPENAI_BASE_URL env: $env:OPENAI_BASE_URL")

PowerShell($headers = @{"Authorization" = "Bearer sk-68ab0203b225414aadd5aeab99f081ab"; "Content-Type" = "application/json"}; $body = '{"model":"deepseek-chat","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"say hi"}],"max_tokens":10}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.deepseek.com/chat/completions" -Method Post -Headers $headers -Body $body -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Output "SUCCESS: $\($r.choices[0].message.content\)" } catch { Write-Output "STATUS: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d.get\('state',d\); print\('task_id:', s.get\('task_id'\)\); print\('step:', s.get\('step'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d['components']['schemas']; print\('--- ResetRequest ---'\); print\(json.dumps\(s.get\('ResetRequest',{}\),indent=2\)\); print\(\); print\('--- StepRequest ---'\); print\(json.dumps\(s.get\('StepRequest',{}\),indent=2\)\); print\(\); print\('--- ResetResponse ---'\); print\(json.dumps\(s.get\('ResetResponse',{}\),indent=2\)\)")
